name: 假夫妻真動心（閃婚型）
name_en: Flash Marriage Leading to True Love
description: 因意外事件閃婚的兩人，婚後在日常互動中漸生真情。衝突核心在於雙方都在隱藏身份，都怕真相揭露後對方離開，製造了「越愛越不敢說」的情感張力。

examples.drama_title: [FULL HD] She Married a Homeless CEO?! | Full Mini Drama HD | Romantic Comedy Series
examples.excerpt: I'll marry you. I can't stand a kind girl like that being bullied. Plus, if I marry her, I won't have to deal with nagging to get married again. / Okay, let's get married. / I want you to be my wife.
examples.context: 因意外事件閃婚的兩人，婚後在日常互動中漸生真情。衝突核心在於雙方都在隱藏身份，都怕真相揭露後對方離開，製造了「越愛越不敢說」的情感張力。
